goal.description: Natural-language description of the goal to execute

phase.description: Must be 'commit' — execution pass that may spend money or mutate state

max_price.description: Approved spend ceiling in PENCE. Schema rejects > 5000 (£50) at request time; executor independently re-enforces the cap.

plan_summary.description: Human-readable summary of the plan produced by the preceding browser_goal.plan step

commit_token.description: Optional token issued by the plan step to chain plan → commit
